title: calea camani
intro: Calea camani, also known as Mexican Dream Herb, is a plant native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Calea camani can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
